put.description:
Partially update an agency's settings blob (admin/service only).

Merges the provided fields into the existing settings JSON. Unrecognised
keys passed via ``extra`` are preserved so downstream extensions can stash
configuration. Secret-like keys (password, token, api_key) are rejected.

Logo URLs are hardened: https:// or Panel-relative paths only — no
javascript: / data: / file:// / etc. Per-agency Panel branding is driven
entirely by ``settings.logo_url`` (light theme) and ``settings.logo_dark_url``
(dark theme; falls back to logo_url if unset).

get.description: Query RBAC audit log. Admin or service token required.

post.description: Write audit log entry. Service token only (kernel internal).

Receive Gmail push notification from Google Pub/Sub.

Must return 200 quickly — Google retries on non-2xx.
All heavy processing happens async via Redis pub/sub.

Receive external webhook and route to extension handler via DirectCallWorkflow.

No user auth — external services (SendGrid, GitHub, etc.) cannot provide user tokens.
The extension webhook handler receives raw headers/body/query_params and
performs its own verification (HMAC, secret header, etc.).

Returns 200 immediately on dispatch. Extension errors are logged, not propagated,
to prevent retries from external services on kernel failures.

get.description:
Read cached health status for an extension from Redis.

Returns the last health snapshot written by the kernel's health check scheduler.
If no data is cached, returns status=unknown.

ActionStep.title: ActionStep
ActionStep.description: Single automation action — NL instruction for Hub dispatch.

AgencySettingsUpdate.title: AgencySettingsUpdate
AgencySettingsUpdate.description:
Partial settings update. Only the keys listed are validated + persisted.

Unknown keys are preserved from the existing settings JSON so extensions
can stash arbitrary configuration without a schema migration. The keys
we explicitly validate:

* ``logo_url``       : optional https:// URL or Panel-relative path.
* ``logo_dark_url``  : optional; used when the Panel renders in dark mode.
* ``compliance_tier``: ``standard`` | ``federal`` | ``enterprise``.
* ``retention_days`` : int 1..3650.
